TRANSLATION OF DOCUMENT 2089-PS
1933 REICHSGESETZBLATT, PART I, PAGE 241
Decree relating to the Reich Air Ministry of 5 May 1933.
A Reich Air Ministry is established as the highest Reich authority for Aviation. The Chief of this office shall have the title "Reich Air Minister"
Jurisdiction will include the functions of the Reich in Aviation; the functions and authority of the now abolished Reichskommissar [Reich Commissioner] for Aviation are transferred to the "Reich Air Minister."
This decree is effective from 1 May 1933.
Berlin, 5 May 1933.
The Reichpresident
von Hindenburg
The Reich Chancellor
Adolf Hitler
The Reich Commissioner for Aviation
Goering
Source:
Nazi Conspiracy and Aggression Volume IV
Office of the United States Chief Counsel for Prosecution of Axis Criminality
Washington, DC : United States Government Printing Office, 1946
